---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for the portfolio site
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: hannahro15
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to add.

## Motivation / Problem it Solves
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what user experience does it improve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you have in mind. Include any relevant implementation details.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you have considered and why the proposed solution is preferred.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context / Mockups
Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or examples here.
